Real I haven't been in school in like 4 and 1/2 years

It was because of three reasons first school is pointless in general second I was burned out and third somebody false accused of R and the school didn't really care that I got accused for something I didn't do

I wish I could go back with the knowledge I have now so I could finish it... Yours is a valid reason.

And even before I was accused like the second half of the school year before when I was in 11th grade and then the beginning of my 12th grade year where I got accused I was already on the outs with school
Besides not seeing the point, I wanted to work
Show up and I would hang at my friend's place or I would only show up for one class and then dip only going to the classes that I care about
Why are people capable of doing things like that?
I have no clue and what's even more weird is the person was a freshman who accuse me who I never seen in the day of my life

It was a weird situation that ultimately helped me find a way to actually get out of school since my family supported me and knowing how stressed I was about the false allegations
